name: DP Fundamentals — Memoization, Tabulation, Optimal Substructure

metadata.career_relevance: Core DP patterns — highest-value DSA topic in senior interviews.

hook.what_you_will_build: DP Fundamentals — Memoization, Tabulation, Optimal Substructure

key_takeaways: DP requires: optimal substructure + overlapping subproblems
Tabulation (bottom-up): fill table iteratively from base cases
Space optimization: when dp[i] only needs dp[i-1] → use two variables
Fibonacci: O(2^n) naive → O(n) memo → O(n) O(1) rolling
Coin Change: dp[amount]=min(dp[amount-coin]+1) for each coin
